name: SelectedCarrierObservationDimensionExtraction
blocked_model: trace-size transcript dimension C.arity.succ + lam against constant observation dimension 1
reason: For positive-arity carrier C with arity 1 at lam 0, the strict-gap inequality would require alpha_den * 2 <= alpha_den - alpha_num, contradicting 0 < alpha_num < alpha_den.
boundary: Obstruction certificate only; no unrestricted Chronos-RR, H4.1/FGL, P-vs-NP, Clay-problem closure, unrestricted admissible-predicate coverage, universal FiberEntropyGap, or nontrivial selected-carrier entropy-gap closure.
